case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JOSEPHINE L RAMOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, JOSEPHINE L $1,125.73 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,366.23, SEE SCANNED DOC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100110435) AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, JOSEPHINE L

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-15-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-15-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
